task1.format: Email/letter/note to a specific recipient. Include greeting and closing.
task1.register: Use tu (friend/colleague) or vous (formal/stranger) based on the consigne.
steps: State your purpose (Je vous écris pour…)

task2.format: Article, letter, or short essay for multiple readers. Recount an experience with commentary/opinions.
task2.register: Generally use vous or impersonal structures. Formal but not overly academic.

task3.format: Analytical article for a journal/website. Based on two documents with opposing viewpoints.
task3.register: Formal academic register. Use on, il est + adj. que, and other impersonal structures.
steps: Part 1 (40-60 words): Summarize the opposing viewpoints of both documents
Part 2 (80-120 words): Present your position with supporting arguments

items.q: Do I need a credit card for the free trial?
items.a: Yes. After securely linking your card via Stripe, your free trial begins (2 months for yearly, 14 days for quarterly, 7 days for monthly). Cancel anytime during the trial — you won't be charged.

Yes. Click "Manage Subscription" on the pricing page to access the Stripe customer portal and cancel with one click — no need to contact support. Your Pro access remains active until the end of the current billing cycle.
We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and other major credit and debit cards, securely processed through Stripe (PCI DSS Level 1 certified).

items.q: Can you guarantee I'll reach CLB 7?
items.a: We do not guarantee any exam results. HiTCF provides high-quality practice aligned with TCF Canada to help you identify and improve weak areas. Final scores depend on many factors. See our disclaimer for details.

items.q: Are these the same as the real exam questions?
items.a: Practice questions are compiled and edited from publicly available materials, covering levels A1–C2 and formatted to match TCF Canada. However, this platform is not officially affiliated, and questions are not identical to actual exam items.

items.q: How do I request a refund?
items.a: You can request a full refund within 48 hours of your first payment. Quarterly/yearly subscribers can get a prorated refund within 14 days. Simply email support@hitcf.com. See our refund policy for details.

exam.title: What is TCF Canada
exam.desc: TCF Canada (Test de connaissance du français pour le Canada) is a French proficiency test developed by France Éducation international (formerly CIEP), designed specifically for Canadian immigration and citizenship applications.
speakingTasks: Role play (5.5 minutes, incl. 2 min prep)

scores.title: NCLC / CLB Score Conversion Table
scores.subtitle: Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada (IRCC) uses NCLC / CLB levels to assess language proficiency. Below is the TCF Canada score conversion.
scores.footnote: * NCLC 7 is the minimum language requirement for most Express Entry and PNP programs, and the target level for most test-takers
scores.nclc7Desc: NCLC 7 (i.e. CLB 7) is the minimum French requirement for most Canadian economic immigration programs. Reaching NCLC 7 means you meet the language threshold for Express Entry (CEC, FSW) and most Provincial Nominee Programs (PNP). Higher NCLC levels (8, 9, 10) earn additional CRS points — NCLC 9 gives the maximum language bonus.

learn.title: Free French Study Resources
learn.subtitle: All free or official resources to help you improve your French from every angle

official.desc: Free French learning platform by the French international TV network. Video courses + interactive exercises for all levels from A1 to C1, organized by themes like culture, society, and science.
French international radio learning channel. Real French news audio with practice exercises. Various speech speeds from slow to normal — excellent TCF listening prep material.
RFI's 'Easy French News' — 10-minute clear, slow-paced daily international news broadcasts. Listen daily to steadily improve your listening comprehension.
Official TCF test organization website. View exam descriptions, scoring criteria, and official sample questions. Essential to understand the real exam format before preparing.
Long-established French learning site with extensive free grammar, vocabulary, listening and reading exercises graded by difficulty. Great for building solid grammar foundations.

Hugo's French learning platform with podcasts, YouTube videos, and courses. Natural French discussing cultural and social topics. Moderate pace with depth — ideal for intermediate learners to break through plateaus.

youtube.desc: Million-subscriber immersive French channel. Johan speaks only French about everyday topics — no grammar rules, just natural input to develop intuition.
French native Dylane's teaching channel focused on grammar explanations and vocabulary expansion. Short, clear, and well-organized episodes.
French teacher Pierre's comprehensive channel covering grammar, vocabulary, pronunciation, and culture. French audio with subtitles — perfect for intensive listening.
Hugo's pure French podcast channel. 20–30 minute episodes discussing cultural and social topics. Moderate pace, great for extensive listening and building speaking/writing material.
Street interview series in France. Real everyday French from native speakers with French-English subtitles. Authentic expressions and spoken rhythm you won't find in textbooks.
Bilingual English-French teaching channel. Alexa explains French grammar and pronunciation in English. Slow pace with lots of examples — perfect for absolute beginners up to A2.

tools.name: Bilibili
tools.desc: Search for 'French A1 textbook audio' or 'TCF prep' — tons of French learning videos with Chinese explanations. The most accessible resource for Chinese-speaking learners.

tools.name: Anki
tools.desc: Free, open-source spaced repetition flashcard app. Download community-shared TCF/DELF vocabulary decks. Scientific algorithms schedule reviews for far better long-term retention than cramming.

tools.name: Duolingo
tools.desc: Gamified language learning app with 10–15 minute daily lessons. While it won't match TCF depth, it's great for maintaining daily French exposure.

tools.name: LogicielÉducatif
tools.desc: French educational games website with mini-games for spelling, grammar, and vocabulary practice. Made for French students but equally effective for learners.

tools.name: Lawless French
tools.desc: Comprehensive French grammar reference site covering all grammar points from beginner to advanced with example sentences and exercises. Use it like a grammar dictionary.

faq.a: No. HiTCF is an independently operated third-party practice platform, not affiliated with France Éducation international or IRCC. Questions are compiled from public materials and formatted to match TCF Canada, but are not identical to actual exam items.

faq.q: What can I do with the free version?
faq.a: The free version includes full access to the first listening set and first 2 reading sets, with both practice and exam modes. Unlimited attempts, forever.

faq.q: What are the benefits of Pro?
faq.a: Unlock all 8,500+ questions (1,200+ sets), including exam mode, wrong answer book, speed drill, vocabulary book, flashcard review, dictation practice, and Anki export. Yearly plan includes 2 months free trial — cancel anytime.

faq.q: Can you guarantee I'll reach CLB 7?
faq.a: No. HiTCF provides high-quality practice aligned with TCF Canada to help you identify and improve weak areas. Final scores depend on many factors — we do not guarantee any exam results.

faq.q: How do I practice speaking and writing?
faq.a: Speaking and writing sections provide real exam topics and tasks, with the option to jump to ChatGPT for AI conversation practice and essay grading. It's like having a free AI tutor.

faq.q: How do I request a refund?
faq.a: Full refund within 48 hours of first payment. Quarterly/yearly subscribers can get a prorated refund within 14 days. Email support@hitcf.com — processed within 3 business days.

refund.title: Refund Policy · Free Trial & Refund Process

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer · Content Sources & Exam Result Notice
disclaimer.description: HiTCF Disclaimer: independent third-party practice platform, not affiliated with TCF officials. CLB level estimates are for reference only. Content sourced from public materials.

disclaimerPage.heading: Disclaimer

notOfficial.title: 1. Not an Official Platform
notOfficial.p1: HiTCF is an independently operated third-party practice platform. The Platform has no affiliation, partnership, or authorization with France Éducation international (formerly CIEP), the official TCF examination body, Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada (IRCC), or any government agency.
notOfficial.p2: “TCF” (Test de connaissance du français) and “TCF Canada” are registered trademarks of France Éducation international. Their use on this Platform is solely to indicate the target format of our practice content.

noGuarantee.title: 2. No Guarantee of Exam Results
noGuarantee.p1: Using this Platform does not guarantee that you will pass the TCF Canada exam or achieve any specific CLB level.
noGuarantee.li1: The “CLB level estimates”, “readiness assessments”, and “predicted levels” displayed are based on statistical analysis of your practice data and are for reference only — they do not equal or predict actual TCF exam scores.
noGuarantee.li2: Actual TCF exam results depend on numerous factors, including but not limited to your condition on exam day, question selection, and scoring criteria, all of which are beyond this Platform’s control.
noGuarantee.li3: Promotional phrases such as “Practice Your Way to CLB 7” are intended to encourage consistent practice and do not constitute any form of score promise or result guarantee.

contentSources.title: 3. Content Sources & Accuracy
contentSources.li1: Practice questions, audio, and related materials on this Platform are compiled and edited from publicly available internet sources. The intellectual property of original content belongs to its respective rights holders.
contentSources.li2: Content has been organized and reviewed, but we do not guarantee 100% accuracy, completeness, or correctness, nor do we guarantee consistency with the actual TCF exam’s format, difficulty, or content.
contentSources.li3: If any rights holder believes content on this Platform infringes their rights, please contact <email>support@hitcf.com</email> and we will address it promptly after verification (including removing relevant content).
contentSources.li4: If you find content errors, we also welcome feedback via the above email and will correct them as soon as possible.

notImmigrationAdvice.title: 4. Not Immigration Advice
notImmigrationAdvice.p1: Any information provided on this Platform (including CLB level explanations, immigration-related terminology, etc.) does not constitute immigration advice, legal advice, or professional consultation. Immigration applications involve complex regulations and policies; we recommend consulting a licensed immigration consultant (RCIC) or immigration lawyer.

thirdPartyLinks.title: 5. Third-Party Links
thirdPartyLinks.p1: This Platform may contain links to third-party websites or services (such as ChatGPT, WhatsApp, etc.). We are not responsible for third-party content, and accessing these links is at the user’s own risk.

userReviews.title: 6. User Reviews & Testimonials
userReviews.p1: User reviews and score shares displayed on the Platform represent individual experiences and do not imply that all users will achieve the same results. Each user’s background, time investment, and study methods differ, and results vary accordingly.

serviceAvailability.title: 7. Service Availability
serviceAvailability.p1: We strive to maintain 24/7 Platform availability, but do not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free service. We are not liable for service interruptions due to maintenance, upgrades, network issues, or force majeure.

liability.title: 8. Limitation of Liability
liability.p1: To the maximum extent permitted by law, HiTCF and its operators shall not be liable for any losses arising from the use of or reliance on Platform content, including but not limited to:
liability.li1: Failing an exam or not achieving the expected level;
liability.li3: Consequences of any decisions made based on Platform estimates.

contact.title: 9. Contact
contact.p1: If you have any questions about this Disclaimer, please contact: <email>support@hitcf.com</email>

disclaimerPage.footerLinks: Other legal documents: <terms>Terms of Service</terms> · <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy> · <refund>Refund Policy</refund>

termsPage.heading: Terms of Service
termsPage.intro: Welcome to HiTCF (hereinafter referred to as “the Platform” or “we”). The Platform is operated by HiTCF, registered in Canada. By using the Platform, you agree to the following terms. If you do not agree, please stop using the Platform.

service.title: 1. Service Description
service.p1: HiTCF is a TCF Canada online practice platform that provides mock practice questions for listening, reading, speaking, and writing. The content provided is for practice and reference purposes only and does not represent or guarantee actual TCF Canada exam scores or results.

account.title: 2. Account & Registration
account.li1: Users authenticate via email-based registration. You are responsible for keeping your login credentials secure.
account.li2: Each account is for personal use only and may not be transferred, lent, or shared with others.
account.li3: If abnormal usage, abuse, or violation of these terms is detected, we reserve the right to suspend or terminate the account.

subscription.title: 3. Subscription & Payment
subscription.li1: The Platform offers free content and paid subscription (Pro) services. Payments are processed through Stripe.
subscription.li2: Subscriptions are auto-renewing. Unless you cancel before the end of the current billing cycle, you will be automatically charged for the next cycle.
subscription.li3: You may cancel your subscription at any time via the Stripe customer portal. After cancellation, your current period remains active.
subscription.li4: Prices may change. We will notify you by email before any price changes, which take effect at the next renewal.
subscription.li5: For refund details, please see our <refund>Refund Policy</refund>.

trial.title: 4. Free Trial
trial.p1: We may offer a free trial period. After the trial ends, if you have not cancelled, you will be automatically charged according to your selected plan. Each user is eligible for one free trial only.

acceptableUse.title: 5. Acceptable Use
acceptableUse.li1: Use any automated means (crawlers, scripts, etc.) to scrape, copy, or download Platform content;
acceptableUse.li2: Redistribute, sell, or commercially use Platform content (questions, audio, explanations, etc.);
acceptableUse.li3: Attempt to bypass payment restrictions, tamper with data, or reverse-engineer or penetration-test the Platform;
acceptableUse.li4: Interfere with the normal operation of the Platform or other users’ experience.

ip.title: 6. Intellectual Property
ip.li1: The Platform’s website design, branding, user interface, and original code are owned by HiTCF and protected by copyright law. They may not be copied, modified, or distributed without written authorization.
ip.li2: Practice questions, audio, and related materials are compiled and edited from publicly available sources. The intellectual property of the original content belongs to its respective rights holders. If any rights holder believes content on this Platform infringes their rights, please contact <email>support@hitcf.com</email> and we will address it promptly after verification.
ip.li3: Users may not scrape, copy, or redistribute any content on this Platform for commercial purposes, regardless of its original source.

disclaimer.title: 7. Disclaimer
disclaimer.li1: Platform content is for learning and practice reference only and does not constitute any form of exam score guarantee, immigration advice, or legal advice.
disclaimer.li2: The “CLB level estimates” and “readiness assessments” provided are based on statistical analysis of practice data and are for reference only — they do not represent actual exam scores.
disclaimer.li3: We strive to ensure content accuracy but are not liable for any errors or omissions in question content.
disclaimer.li4: For the full disclaimer, please see our <disclaimerLink>Disclaimer</disclaimerLink> page.

serviceChanges.title: 8. Service Changes & Interruptions
serviceChanges.p1: We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or terminate all or part of the service without prior notice. We are not liable for any losses caused by service interruptions. We will make reasonable efforts to provide advance notice of significant changes.

liability.title: 9. Limitation of Liability
liability.p1: To the maximum extent permitted by law, HiTCF and its operators shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from the use or inability to use the Platform, including but not limited to unsatisfactory exam results, immigration application outcomes, or data loss.

governing.title: 10. Governing Law & Dispute Resolution
governing.p1: These terms are governed by the laws of Canada. Any disputes arising from these terms or use of the Platform shall first be resolved through good-faith negotiation; if negotiation fails, they shall be submitted to a court of competent jurisdiction in Canada.

modifications.title: 11. Modifications to Terms
modifications.p1: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Updated terms will be posted on this page with an updated “Last updated” date. Continued use of the Platform constitutes acceptance of the modified terms. We will notify you by email of significant changes.

contact.title: 12. Contact
contact.p1: If you have any questions about these terms, please contact: <email>support@hitcf.com</email>

privacyPage.heading: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.intro: HiTCF (hereinafter referred to as “the Platform” or “we”) values your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal information, in compliance with Canada’s Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act (PIPEDA).

infoCollect.title: 1. Information We Collect
infoCollect.authP1: Users register and log in via email. Through this process, we collect:
infoCollect.payP1: Paid subscriptions are processed through Stripe. We do not directly store your credit card numbers or bank card information. Stripe, as a PCI DSS Level 1 certified payment processor, independently manages your payment data. We only store:
infoCollect.payLi3: Payment event records (success/failure, no card numbers)
infoCollect.usageP1: During your use of the Platform, we automatically collect:
infoCollect.usageLi1: Practice and exam records (answers, scores, time spent)
infoCollect.usageLi3: Practice statistics (accuracy rates, streak days, etc.)
infoCollect.cookieP1: The Platform uses the following cookies or similar technologies:
infoCollect.cookieLi1: Authentication Token: Used for identity verification and maintaining login state (essential cookie)
infoCollect.cookieLi2: Locale Preference: Used to remember your language preference (essential cookie)
infoCollect.cookieP2: The Platform currently does not use third-party analytics tools (such as Google Analytics) or advertising tracking cookies. If introduced in the future, this policy will be updated and users will be notified.

purpose.title: 2. Purpose of Information Use
purpose.p1: Personal information we collect is used solely for:
purpose.li1: Providing and maintaining Platform services (authentication, practice records, performance statistics)
purpose.li2: Processing subscription payments and managing account status
purpose.li3: Sending you important account-related notifications (subscription changes, terms updates)
purpose.li4: Improving Platform features and user experience
purpose.p2: We will not use your personal information for advertising or sell it to third parties.

storage.title: 3. Data Storage & Security
storage.li1: User data is stored in a MongoDB database deployed in a secure cloud server environment.
storage.li2: Audio files are hosted on Microsoft Azure Blob Storage.
storage.li3: All data transmission is encrypted via HTTPS/TLS.
storage.li4: We take reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect your data, but no internet transmission or electronic storage is 100% secure.

thirdParty.title: 4. Third-Party Services
thirdParty.p1: The Platform uses the following third-party services, each with their own privacy policies:

retention.title: 5. Data Retention
retention.li1: Account information: Retained for the duration of your account.
retention.li2: Practice records: Retained for the duration of your account. If you delete your account, related data will be deleted within 30 days.
retention.li3: Payment records: May be retained for up to 7 years as required by tax and legal obligations.

rights.title: 6. Your Rights
rights.p1: Under PIPEDA and applicable laws, you have the right to:
rights.li1: Access: View the personal information we hold about you.
rights.li2: Correction: Request correction of inaccurate personal information.
rights.li3: Deletion: Request deletion of your personal information (subject to legal retention obligations).
rights.li4: Data Export: Obtain a copy of your practice data.
rights.li5: Withdraw Consent: Withdraw consent for data processing (which may result in inability to use certain services).
rights.p2: To exercise these rights, please contact: <email>support@hitcf.com</email>. We will respond to your request within 30 days.

minors.title: 7. Minors
minors.p1: The Platform is not intended for individuals under 16 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from minors. If we discover we have collected information from a minor, it will be immediately deleted.

crossBorder.title: 8. Cross-Border Data Transfers
crossBorder.p1: Your data may be stored and processed on servers outside of Canada (including but not limited to the United States, due to the use of Stripe, Azure, and similar services). We ensure that these service providers maintain adequate data protection measures.

policyChanges.title: 9. Policy Changes
policyChanges.p1: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Updated policies will be posted on this page with an updated “Last updated” date. For significant changes, we will notify you by email.

contact.title: 10. Contact
contact.p1: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or need to exercise your data rights, please contact:

refundPage.heading: Refund Policy
refundPage.intro: Thank you for choosing HiTCF. This refund policy applies to all paid subscription services purchased through the Platform.

freeTrial.title: 1. Free Trial
freeTrial.li1: All new users are eligible for a free trial (2 months for the yearly plan, 7 days for monthly/quarterly plans). No charges during the trial period.
freeTrial.li2: You may cancel at any time during the trial at no cost.
freeTrial.li3: After the trial ends, if not cancelled, you will be automatically charged according to your selected plan.
freeTrial.li4: Each user (per email address) is eligible for one free trial only.

cancellation.title: 2. Subscription Cancellation
cancellation.li1: You may cancel your subscription at any time via the “Manage Subscription” button on the <pricing>Pricing page</pricing>, which opens the Stripe customer portal.
cancellation.li2: After cancellation, your Pro access remains active until the end of the current billing period, after which you will be downgraded to a free user.
cancellation.li3: Cancelling a subscription does not automatically generate a refund.

conditions.title: 3. Refund Conditions
conditions.p1: The following situations are eligible for a refund:
conditions.fullLi1: Within 48 hours of your first payment, if you are unsatisfied with the service.
conditions.fullLi2: If a Platform technical issue (such as prolonged login failures or widespread feature outages) prevents you from using the service, and we fail to resolve it within 72 hours.
conditions.proLi1: Quarterly or yearly subscribers who request a refund within 14 days of payment may receive a prorated refund for unused days.
conditions.noLi1: Monthly subscribers requesting a refund after the initial 48 hours.
conditions.noLi2: Quarterly/yearly subscribers requesting a refund after 14 days.
conditions.noLi3: Non-use due to personal reasons (e.g., forgetting to cancel auto-renewal, personal scheduling).
conditions.noLi4: Refund requests based on unsatisfactory exam results (the Platform does not guarantee exam outcomes — see our <disclaimerLink>Disclaimer</disclaimerLink>).
conditions.noLi5: Account suspension or termination due to violation of <termsLink>Terms of Service</termsLink>.

process.title: 4. Refund Process
process.step2: We will review and respond within 3 business days.
process.step3: Once approved, the refund will be processed via Stripe to your original payment method, typically arriving within 5–10 business days.

disputes.title: 5. Stripe Disputes
disputes.p1: If you initiate a dispute (chargeback) through your bank or credit card company, we will provide transaction records and service usage evidence in response. We recommend contacting us before initiating a dispute — we prefer to resolve issues through friendly communication.

schema.siteDescription: TCF Canada online practice platform — 8,500+ questions to help you reach CLB 7
schema.faq1a: No. HiTCF is an independently operated third-party practice platform with no affiliation to France Éducation international or IRCC. Practice questions are compiled from publicly available materials and formatted to match TCF Canada, but are not actual exam questions.
schema.faq2q: What can I do with the free version?
schema.faq2a: The free version includes the first listening set and first 2 reading sets with all questions, in both practice and exam mode. Unlimited attempts, forever free.
schema.faq3q: What are the benefits of Pro?
schema.faq3a: Unlock all 8,500+ questions (1,200+ sets), including exam mode, wrong answer notebook, speed drill, vocabulary tools, flashcard review, dictation, and Anki export. Yearly plans include a 2-month free trial, cancel anytime.
schema.faq4q: Can you guarantee I’ll reach CLB 7?
schema.faq4a: No. HiTCF provides a practice environment aligned with TCF Canada to help you identify and improve weak areas. However, actual scores depend on many factors — we do not promise any exam results.
schema.faq5q: How do I practice speaking and writing?
schema.faq5a: Speaking and writing sections provide real exam topics and tasks, with the option to jump to ChatGPT for AI conversation practice and essay correction — essentially a free AI tutor.
schema.faq6q: How do I request a refund?
schema.faq6a: Full refund within 48 hours of first payment. Quarterly/yearly subscribers can get a prorated refund within 14 days. Simply email support@hitcf.com — processed within 3 business days.
